revision.comment: Trappist the monk created the page [[Module:Citation/CS1/style.css]] using a non-default content model "Sanitized CSS": experimenting with template styles
copy/paste from [[Template:Catalog lookup link/style.css]] because mediawiki wouldn't let me move that page here;
Trappist the monk moved page [[Module:Citation/CS1/style.css]] to [[Module:Citation/CS1/styles.css]] without leaving a redirect: per naming convention at [[WP:TemplateStyles]];
make most text 80 characters or shorter (general best practice)
we like English in our notes, and English has punctuation
Protected "[[Module:Citation/CS1/styles.css]]": match protection level of root module; ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
per [[Help talk:Citation Style 1#Protected edit request on 4 March_2019|edit request]];
Protected "[[Module:Citation/CS1/styles.css]]": Highly visible template ([Edit=Allow only administrators] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only administrators] (indefinite))
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Citation/CS1/styles.css]]: importing for the list. This is a canonical list of Shrines to work with

Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1237875763|1237875763]] by [[Special:Contributions/Jon (WMF)|Jon (WMF)]] ([[User talk:Jon (WMF)|talk]]) drive-by edits to the live module without evidence of testing and discussion at [[Help talk:Citation Style 1]] strongly discouraged; make your edits to the sandbox, test and discuss;

Well, since we're editing this today, I'll pull from sandbox, which *does* have the same change and has had the same change for a month (which you would have seen if you checked). If you don't understand CSS, consider asking a question instead of blindly reverting an otherwise correct edit.
Fixes [[phab:T369874]]. Please see talk page and do not revert without discussion. See also [[meta:User:Jon_(WMF)/Edit_for_dark_mode_support]]
1 revision imported: importing the refn stuff to try to fix the Okinawa article
1 revision imported: importing the refn stuff to try to fix the Okinawa article
1 revision imported: I hope this manages to go through
1 revision imported: chat is this real
1 revision imported: chat is this real
Bot: Reverting edits from past 90 minutes

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: re-importing and overwriting due to the weird script failure
25 revisions imported: importing this back, idk why it was lost
